title: Business Breakfast | Stock/Share Market News | 8th June 2026 | TV5 Money

recommendations.note: Penny stock with perpetual debt-restructuring talk that never happens; only as a small dark-horse bet.
recommendations.detail: AVOID / dark-horse only. Penny stock with perpetual "debt restructuring any day" talk that never materializes; consider only under a small dark-horse bet.

recommendations.note: Good recent price action; resilient near 52-week high even on a weak day. Hold with trailing stop-loss.
recommendations.detail: HOLD with a trailing stop-loss. Good recent price action; resilient near its 52-week high even on a weak day.

recommendations.note: Post-result price action after a long weak phase; hold with stop ~60, turnaround must continue.
recommendations.detail: HOLD with a stop-loss ~60. Some post-result price action after a long weak phase; if the March turn-around continues it forms higher tops/bottoms, else fresh weakness possible.

recommendations.note: Order book ~2,434 cr (~2x turnover, ~= market cap); upper circuit on May orders; emerging nuclear-power mid-cap, hold the story.
recommendations.detail: Strong order book (₹632 cr May inflows; ₹2,434 cr total, ~2x last-year turnover; order book ≈ market cap). At upper circuit on the news; emerging mid-cap with clear earnings visibility (nuclear-power theme per Kranti). Continue holding the story.

recommendations.note: New listing never below listing price; emerging pharma growth story that rises steadily, buy on dips.
recommendations.detail: BUY on dips. New listing that has never gone below its listing price; an emerging pharma growth story that rises steadily.

recommendations.note: Good robotics theme but financials suspect, promoters selling, lower tops/bottoms; wait, don't buy now (hold if already in).
recommendations.detail: AVOID for now. Good robotics theme/potential, but financials look suspect and promoters are selling (rising cash-conversion cycle); stock in lower tops/bottoms (~170). If already holding, hold; new buyers should wait.

recommendations.note: Chemicals; good March result but high expectations led to post-result correction; value here, don't book loss hastily.
recommendations.detail: HOLD; don't book the loss hastily. Chemicals; good March result but high expectations led to a post-result correction; value around ~1,130, not a bad stock.

recommendations.note: Competes with the Ambanis in ports/shipbuilding; showed strength on recent news. Hold, no immediate fresh buying.
recommendations.detail: HOLD; no immediate fresh buying. Stands as competition to the Ambanis in ports/shipbuilding; showed some strength on recent news.
